SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2018 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ALISON MURDOCK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEVEN JEFFE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURDOCK, ALISON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JEFFE, STEVEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
